raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The fentanyl epidemic is a national and state-wide public health and safety crisis.",
    "In Fresno County, fentanyl overdoses more than doubled from 2019 to 2020.",
    "The distribution of fentanyl is often extremely deceptive, resulting in countless accidental deaths.",
    "Fentanyl is up to 50 times stronger than heroin.",
    "AB 675 would extend existing laws that prohibit possession of controlled substances while armed to include fentanyl."
  ]
}
```
